headline: HCA Healthcare Kicks off Month of Volunteerism and Announces $2 Million HCA Healthcare Foundation Grant to Second Harvest Food Bank of Middle Tennessee
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., April 01, 2026--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA), one of the nation’s leading healthcare providers, today announced the HCA Healthcare Foundation will give $2 million to Second Harvest Food Bank of Middle Tennessee to support the development of their new Grow for Good campus in Nashville, Tennessee. Since 2020, Second Harvest has seen a 46% increase in neighbors seeking assistance, driving an unprecedented level of need across its 46-county service area. The new campus will more
